calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Hal Buckner'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants the McLoughlin Gallery, LLC and Joan McLoughlin.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Matthew R. Harrison, Esq. appeared for Hal Buckner, who not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendants the McLoughlin Gallery, LLC and Joan McLoughlin.
Defaults were entered against defendants the McLoughlin Gallery, LLC and Joan McLoughlin on October 25, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 27, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hal Buckner, and against the Defaulted Defendants the McLoughlin Gallery, LLC and Joan McLoughlin, as follows:

Damages - $60,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,592.44.
Attorney Fees - $16,720.31.
Costs - $861.26.
Total - $84,174.01.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Continued To Apr-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
